global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo at the top, central graphic areas, and a strong call to action at the bottom.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the ClearLedger app for better financial management.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main graphic area
elements.description: A central graphic area that is empty, suggesting space for an image or illustration related to finance.

elements.label: Graphic shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one oval and one rectangle, in a light color, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Additional graphic area
elements.description: Another central graphic area that is empty, indicating potential for additional visual content.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold text reading 'Your money, clearer' in a large font, centered at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer licc Install now

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now' in a bold font, designed to attract attention.
